docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $750.00 FILED BY SCHROEDER, SHEILA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LIU, LILIANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROEDER, SHEILA IF PLFT/X-DEFT (LIU) WISHES TO RECOVER FOR THE RENT STORAGE OR FEES AND COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIU, LILIANNA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROEDER, SHEILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHROEDER, SHEILA
OR QUIT & $236.48 LATE CHARGES). THE COURT FINDS IN THE DEFT/XC'S (SCHROEDER) FAVOR ON ALL OTHER REPAIR/CLEANING ITEMS AND AGAINST DEFT. ON HER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SCHROEDER, SHEILA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT LIU, LILIANNA THE COURT FINDS THAT PLFT/XC (LIU) IS HOLDING A SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $3459.36 (DEPOSIT: $3375 PLUS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
(ADD'L TERMS ON PLTF'S CLAIM): IF PLTF/X-DEFT (LIU) WISHES TO RECOVER FOR THE RENT SHORTAGE OR FEES AND COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH THE EVICTION
(ADD'L TERMS ON DEFT'S CLAIM): INTEREST: $84.36). FROM THE TOTAL DEPOSIT, THE COURT DEDUCTS $3866.20 ($3,629.72 PURSUANT TO PLTF'S 3 DAY NOTICE TO PAY
ACTION (CASE #170986), SHE SHOULD DO IT IN THAT ACTION WHICH IS STILL PENDING. ALTERNATIVELY, PLTF CAN DISMISS CASE #170986 & FILE ANOTHER ACTION.
